description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall finishes, large rectangular windows, and a prominent garage attached to the side. The front yard is paved with a driveway and includes a parked car, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a shaded patio area. Several trees and landscaped elements surround the property, adding greenery and privacy. The house has a spacious, open layout with multiple entry points and large glass doors leading to the outdoor living spaces. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on outdoor-indoor connectivity and functional luxury.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped trees and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway with a car, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard with pool and patio furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, lounge area, patio, and multiple large windows and doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's dark exterior, rear pool area, and the transition between front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, paved steps, and minimal overhang, integrated with the garage and front yard landscaping.
